title: Lance vs the Angels
wikitext:
[]: Lance vs the Angels             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sat Sep 12, 2009 7:31 pm Kay, so lets say that all our favorite little Eva pilots are taken down, and the Angel makes it to Lilith whom they believe to be adam. If they by accident happened to touch the lance before Lilith, would the Angel be disabled? And just what would happen if they actually made contact with Lilith? would she be awakened?

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Sep 12, 2009 9:35 pm The Lance kinda has to...impale you. Just touching it with your finger isn't gonna mess you up. As for Lilith, well, who knows? Kaworu implies that Lilith is useless to the Angels, so probably nothing.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sun Sep 13, 2009 6:45 am On the other hand, the lance can move of it's own violation...it might decide that Lillith will keep for a bit while it rockets the invader into solar orbit

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sun Sep 13, 2009 1:47 pm Maybe so, but the Lances are made to target Seeds of Life, not Lilin or Angels.

[]:             Quote Post by wonderluster » Sun Sep 13, 2009 6:06 pm But it did take out an Angel, not only that but when it encountered an AT field, it actually tried harder.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Sep 13, 2009 7:42 pm The lances are for Adam and Lilith, so I don’t think they would have any effect on anyone else.

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Sun Sep 13, 2009 8:04 pm Well as mentioned, it worked on an angel, and it reacted to 01 in EOE

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Sun Sep 13, 2009 8:11 pm With Unit 1, that was part of 3rd impact. As for the angel, the lance was thrown at the angel, it didn’t do anything on its own.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Sep 13, 2009 8:15 pm Touching the lance would do know damage to an angel. The lance can only harm/kill an angel is if it thrown at the angel since the lance can pierce any A.T. Field.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Mon Sep 14, 2009 3:36 pm Also, one could argue that Unit 01 is a Seed of Life by the time EoE rolls around, so...
